title: Hello World
excerpt: Welcome to my blog. This is where I'll share my thoughts, projects, and ideas.
content:
# Hello World

Welcome to my personal blog. This is my first post.

I'll be writing about:

- **Technology** – things I'm building and learning
- **Design** – thoughts on UI, UX, and visual craft
- **Life** – musings and reflections

Stay tuned for more content coming soon.
